results.title: Integrated data processing core and array data processor and method for …
results.description: An integrated data processing core and a data processor are provided on a single integrated circuit and command sequences are forwarded from the data processing core to be executed on the array data processor wherein the command sequences comprise a group of instructions defining an algorithm.
